accurate.why: All claims match the new PHS Act Part W provisions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; details track the statute.

states_purpose.why: States the National Parkinson's Project purpose to prevent, diagnose, treat, cure Parkinson's.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill amends the Public Health Service Act by adding a new part/section.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes Advisory Council membership requirements and information-sharing conditions.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 24-month/18-month deadlines and the end-of-2035 sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures Project, national plan, annual assessment, Advisory Council, and 2035 sunset.

correct_entities.why: HHS Secretary, named agencies, and Advisory Council all correct.

correct_figures.why: Deadlines (24/18 months), member counts (10), and 2035 sunset are correct.
